name: Prune Whip Spice Cake with Prune Butter Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Prune juice, drained from cooked prunes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt and spices into a large bowl of electric mixer.
2. Add shortening, prune juice and milk. Beat with electric mixer for 1-1/2 minutes on slow or medium speed. Scrape the bowl and beaters; mix well.
3. Add eggs and vanilla. Beat for 1-1/2 minutes more on slow or medium speed. Scrape and mix again.
4. Stir once around the bowl with a spoon.
5. Pour batter into two 8-inch layer cake pans which have been greased and floured.
6. Bake in a 350 degree F. oven for 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Frost with Prune Butter Frosting.
PRUNE BUTTER FROSTING:
6 tablespoons butter or margarine
3 cups confectioners' sugar, sifted
3/4 teaspoon Lemon juice
4 to 4-1/2 tablespoons Prune juice
1 teaspoon Grated lemon rind
Salt, dash
1/2 cup Prunes, cut-up, cooked, well-drained
2 tablespoons Chopped nuts
Cream butter or margarine in a large bowl of electric mixer. Add sugar alternately with juices; beat until well blended. Add grated rind and salt. Beat until frosting is of good spreading consistency. Fold in prunes and nuts. This cake and frosting will freeze.
